Name: UTextLayoutWidget
Description:
Base class for all widgets that use a text layout.
  Contains the common options that should be exposed for the underlying Slate widget.

Variables.Name: ShapedTextOptions
Variables.Description: Controls how the text within this widget should be shaped.

Variables.Name: Justification
Variables.Description: How the text should be aligned with the margin.

Variables.Name: bNeedVerticalJustificationWhenOverflow
Variables.Description: Should the text still be justified vertically when it overflow its block.

Variables.Name: AutoWrapText
Variables.Description: True if we're wrapping text automatically based on the computed horizontal space for this widget.

Variables.Name: WrapTextAt
Variables.Description: Whether text wraps onto a new line when it's length exceeds this width; if this value is zero or negative, no wrapping occurs.

Variables.Name: Margin
Variables.Description: The amount of blank space left around the edges of text area.

Variables.Name: LineHeightPercentage
Variables.Description: The amount to scale each lines height by.
